finding: Live Optimization accepted telemetry only from the first observed repeated run, so run 2+ were invisible
resolution: Replaced single-run lock with independent per-run telemetry buckets, Auto-follow latest-started behavior, and manual repeated-run selection

finding: Portfolio Manager checkbox-selected plots were generally unavailable until the complete experiment/export stage
resolution: Added portfolio-aware live, progressive, completed-run, provisional repeated-run, and independently validated previews in the Live Optimization canvas while keeping inference-dependent statistics final-stage

finding: IEEE-300 PYPOWER cross-validation could fail when upstream ENFORCE_Q_LIMS attempted to demote the REF bus with no valid PV replacement
resolution: Independent validator now runs PYPOWER Newton solves with ENFORCE_Q_LIMS=0 and independently applies aggregate PV-only Q-limit switching from the original controlled case while retaining REF semantics

finding: Reference/slack generator Q reporting silently clipped the solved reactive requirement to Q limits, making stored/displayed Q inconsistent with the solved network
resolution: Reference-bus output allocation now preserves the exact solved aggregate Q; any capability excess remains explicit for constraints and validation

finding: IEEE-300 was not included in the mandatory independent PYPOWER scientific regression matrix
resolution: Added case300 to scientific cross-validation tests and validation CLI choices; compares voltage, angle, losses, final bus types, and aggregate generator Q

finding: Scientific fairness/parity auditing could temporarily starve the Qt event loop and appear unresponsive
resolution: Audit remains in a QThread, now emits staged progress and limits Torch host threads during CPU fallback parity checks; CUDA/XPU remains preferred when available

finding: GPU-maximum numerical execution needed to remain the default while fixing GUI/audit paths
resolution: Preserved gpu_preferred 100/0/0 numerical scheduling: CUDA first, then XPU fallback, then CPU fallback; mandatory UI, persistence, reporting, and independent validation remain host-side

finding: Per-version PATCH_NOTES files cluttered the repository and could be recommitted
resolution: Removed obsolete PATCH_NOTES_v*.md files and added a .gitignore rule; release history is consolidated in CHANGELOG.md

finding: v3.4.1 CrossRunBatchBroker hotfix must remain intact
resolution: Retained candidate-count bookkeeping, error propagation, liveness watchdog, representation/device compatibility keys, and malformed-input guards from v3.4.1
